I am not sure what this test failure it. Trying to restart...

@cevich @edsantiago @baude Looks like we have an exec failure in the system tests, now - https://cirrus-ci.com/task/4845339475705856

Restarting it here so this can go in

>Looks like we have an exec failure in the system tests, now

Yeah, it's the same one as always (#5339). It seems less frequent in system tests than in e2e, but still happens.
